notes:
The following 2 launch options will prompt the following message:
Sorcery Saga has stopped working. Crash dump has been generated
Wine could not be closed.
PROTON_USE_WINED3D11=1 %command%
PROTON_NO_ESYNC=1 %command%

The following launch option does not launch anything. Nothing appears.
PROTON_NO_D3D11=1 %command%
title: Sorcery Saga: Curse of the Great Curry God
